signals.headline: US and Iran Pursue Fresh Talks Before Ceasefire Expires** | NO | HIGH confidence
signals.raw:
US and Iran Pursue Fresh Talks Before Ceasefire Expires** | NO | HIGH confidence

The most significant recent development is that **negotiations remain ongoing despite failed talks over the weekend**[1][2][3]. The US and Iran are discussing another round of negotiations in an attempt to reach a deal before a two-week ceasefire announced April 7 expires next week[1]. President Trump stated that Ira
